---
title: "Laetitia Frances Selwyn"
---

## Laetitia Frances Selwyn

**Dates:** (1807-1886)

### Description

headmistress of a school for girls at Sandwell Hall

### Biography

She was sister of the Rt. Rev. [[person:1295]George Augustus Selwyn], Bishop of New Zealand and then of Lichfield.

### Letters

- Letter from March 23d 1872

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
